events.name: Wolf Tracks
events.description: Fresh paw prints cross the leaf-strewn path. Something large hunted here recently.

outcomes.description: You find an abandoned den with scavenged coin.
The trail goes cold in thick brush.

choices.text: Give the area a wide berth

outcomes.description: You skirt the hunting ground and continue safely.

events.name: Mushroom Circle
events.description: Pale fungi grow in a perfect ring beneath an ancient oak.

outcomes.description: Edible caps fetch a few coins at the next village.
You pick a toxic lookalike and feel ill for hours.
Old superstition keeps your hands clean.

events.name: Lost Child
events.description: A sobbing child stumbles from the undergrowth, mud-stained and terrified.

choices.text: Calm the child and search for kin

outcomes.description: Villagers reward you for returning the lost heir.
The child panics and flees deeper into the woods.

choices.text: Escort them toward the nearest road

outcomes.description: A grateful parent pays you at the forest edge.

events.name: Bandit Scout
events.description: A scout watches the road from a pine thicket, hand on a dagger.

outcomes.description: You disarm the lookout and claim their purse.
The scout escapes and raises an alarm.
The scout takes your gold and vanishes.
They laugh and try to rob you instead.

events.name: Herbalist's Cache
events.description: A hidden satchel of dried herbs hangs from a branch marker.

outcomes.description: Rare herbs sell well to apothecaries.
The owner returns and accuses you of theft.

choices.text: Mark the tree and move on

events.name: Fallen Oak Bridge
events.description: A rotted log bridge spans a rushing creek.

outcomes.description: You reach the far bank with dry boots.
You slip and soak your gear.

choices.text: Wade downstream at a shallow bend

outcomes.description: Cold water, but no broken bones.

events.name: Dryad's Warning
events.description: Bark-like eyes open in a trunk. 'Turn back, mortal.'

outcomes.description: The dryad grants a faint blessing.

choices.text: Ignore the warning and press on

outcomes.description: The forest feels colder behind you.

events.name: Poacher's Trap
events.description: A steel snare waits beneath leaves near a game trail.

outcomes.description: You salvage the mechanism for parts.
The trap snaps shut on your boot.

events.name: Abandoned Campsite
events.description: Cold ashes and torn canvas mark a hurried departure.

outcomes.description: A coin pouch was left in the panic.
A wounded traveler was hiding — they thank you with gold.
You recover strength among the trees.

events.name: Stag in the Clearing
events.description: A magnificent stag watches you, antlers crowned with mist.

outcomes.description: A moment of peace steadies your nerves.

events.name: Whispering Hollow
events.description: Voices echo without source between the trunks.

outcomes.description: An old shrine hides a small offering.
Nothing but wind — but your nerves fray.
A wraith lashes out before fading.
Some places should not be named.

events.name: Beekeeper's Wagon
events.description: An overturned wagon leaks honey into the moss.

choices.text: Right the wagon and help the keeper

outcomes.description: They pay you in honey and coin.
The bees swarm and drive you off.

choices.text: Take a jar and move on

events.name: Ranger's Signal
events.description: Three stones stacked by the path — a ranger's sign.

outcomes.description: A hidden supply cache rewards the wise.
You misread the sign and wander in circles.

events.name: Foxfire Lights
events.description: Pale flames dance above a bog without heat.

outcomes.description: They lead to a buried coffer.
The bog claims your boots and patience.

events.name: Hunter's Snare
events.description: A rabbit struggles in a wire noose.

outcomes.description: The trap was rigged — it bites your hand.

events.name: Ancient Waystone
events.description: Runes weathered on stone point three directions.

outcomes.description: You glean a shortcut worth gold saved.

events.name: Crow Murder
events.description: Crows circle something in the ferns.

outcomes.description: A fallen courier still carries a purse.
Let the crows finish their work.

events.name: Fairy Rings of Dew
events.description: Dew hangs in perfect beads on spider silk at dawn.

events.name: Logging Dispute
events.description: Two woodcutters argue over marked trees.

outcomes.description: Both sides pay you for fairness.
Not your forest, not your feud.

events.name: Hidden Spring
events.description: Clear water bubbles from roots into a stone basin.

outcomes.description: You sell blessed spring water later.

events.name: Thorn Hedge Maze
events.description: A natural hedge blocks the shortcut.

outcomes.description: You find berries and a coin on the far side.

events.name: Elk Migration
events.description: A herd crosses the trail — hundreds of hooves shake the earth.

choices.text: Wait for the herd to pass
Try to ride a stray calf

outcomes.description: A wild ride and a story worth drinks.

events.name: Smuggler's Drop
events.description: A marked tree hides a wax-sealed packet.

events.name: Owl's Lament
events.description: A giant owl watches from a branch, unblinking.

outcomes.description: The owl drops a silver ring.

events.name: Forest Fire Scar
events.description: Blackened trunks mark last season's blaze.

outcomes.description: Embers still burn — smoke chokes you.
Ash coats your cloak but nothing worse.

events.name: Offering Bowl Empty
events.description: A stone shrine stands mossy and forgotten. The offering bowl is empty.

events.name: Pilgrim's Prayer
events.description: A weary pilgrim kneels, lips moving in silent devotion.

events.name: Desecrated Altar
events.description: Someone defiled the shrine with crude graffiti.

events.name: Moonlit Vigil
events.description: Candles flicker though no worshipper remains.

events.name: Sacred Spring
events.description: Holy water pools beneath the shrine steps.

events.name: Guardian Statue
events.description: A weathered saint's statue weeps resin tears.

events.name: Heretic's Debate
events.description: A preacher argues with a skeptical knight.

events.name: Bell Without Rope
events.description: A bronze bell hangs but its rope was cut.

events.name: Relic Pedestal
events.description: An empty pedestal waits for a returned relic.

events.name: Forest Blessing
events.description: Priests once blessed travelers here. Residue lingers.

events.name: Cave Mouth Whispers
events.description: Goblin chatter echoes from a crack in the hillside.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Tripwire Warning
events.description: Crude goblin sigils mark a trapped approach.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Captured Supplies
events.description: Abandoned packs litter the forest verge near the cave.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Scout Laughter
events.description: High giggles carry on the wind from hidden watchers.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Wolf-Goblin Feud
events.description: Goblins and wolves snarl at each other across the path.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Smoke Trail
events.description: Greenish smoke rises — goblin cookfires inside.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Rope Bridge
events.description: Goblins lashed a rope bridge over a ravine entrance.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Bounty Poster
events.description: A village posted gold for goblin ears.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Trapped Merchant
events.description: A merchant begs for help — goblins took his cart.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Night Patrol
events.description: Torchlight bobs near the cave mouth after dusk.

outcomes.description: You map a safe approach for later.

choices.text: Withdraw and report to the village

events.name: Avalanche Scar
events.description: Fresh rockfall blocks the high pass.

events.name: Eagle's Nest
events.description: A golden eagle guards cliff-side eggs.

events.name: Frozen Corpse
events.description: A climber's body preserves a map in frozen hands.

events.name: Hermit's Cave
events.description: Smoke curls from a cave above the treeline.

events.name: Ice Bridge
events.description: A frozen waterfall creates a perilous crossing.

events.name: Ore Vein
events.description: Quartz and iron glitter in an exposed cliff face.

events.name: Mountain Bandits
events.description: Bandits demand toll on a narrow ledge.

events.name: Sacred Peak
events.description: Prayer flags snap in thin air near a summit cairn.

events.name: Goat Herder
events.description: A herder offers cheese and rumors of dragons.

events.name: Sudden Blizzard
events.description: Weather turns without warning.

events.name: Abandoned Mine
events.description: Timbers groan in a collapsed mine mouth.

events.name: Griffon Shadow
events.description: A vast shadow circles once and vanishes.

events.name: Hot Spring
events.description: Sulfur steam rises from a rocky pool.

events.name: Climber's Distress
events.description: A voice calls from a crevice below the path.

events.name: Starfall Crater
events.description: A recent impact smoldered in alpine turf.

events.name: Shady Potion Deal
events.description: A hooded mage offers glowing vials from a shadowed alley.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Marked Cards
events.description: A gambler invites you to a back-room game.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Fence's Whisper
events.description: A fence knows who buys stolen relics.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Night Watch Bribe
events.description: A guard offers to look away for coin.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Cursed Curiosity Shop
events.description: The shop window displays items that move when unseen.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Alley Duel
events.description: Two rogues circle each other under a broken lantern.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Forgery Request
events.description: A noble's seal could be copied for the right price.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Street Preacher
events.description: A prophet screams that the end walks among us.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Ratcatcher's Tip
events.description: Ratcatchers know every sewer entrance.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Blackmail Note
events.description: An anonymous note demands payment or secrets spill.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Tavern Tip-off
events.description: A drunk mercenary sells dungeon rumors cheap.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Lantern Thief
events.description: Someone steals lanterns during the fog.

outcomes.description: The city's grime wins this round.
Surviving the alley is victory enough.

events.name: Cave Guard Post
events.description: A goblin dozes beside a bone whistle.

events.name: Warning Skulls
events.description: Skulls on pikes line the tunnel mouth.

events.name: Stolen Signpost
events.description: Village signs were dragged here as trophies.

events.name: Sulfur Draft
events.description: Rotten-egg air pours from the depths.

events.name: Crude Toll
events.description: Goblins demand teeth or gold to pass.

events.name: Bat Swarm
events.description: Bats erupt as you near the entrance.

events.name: Rival Tribe Marks
events.description: Fresh paint claims territory — war brewing.

events.name: Prisoner Plea
events.description: A muffled voice begs from behind a grate.

events.name: Fungus Farm
events.description: Goblins cultivate glowing mushrooms for stew.

events.name: Shaman's Den
events.description: Bones and charms hang in a side chamber.

events.name: Prison Cage
events.description: Village prisoners huddle in a rusted cage.

events.name: Loot Pile
events.description: Discarded adventurer gear forms a trash throne.

events.name: Trap Corridor
events.description: Pit spikes wait under woven mats.

events.name: Goblin Feast
events.description: Roasted rat and stolen wine flow freely.

events.name: Tunnel Collapse
events.description: Recent fighting collapsed a tunnel.

events.name: War Drum
events.description: Drums signal muster deeper in.

events.name: Shrine of Grib
events.description: A crude idol drips with offerings.

events.name: Escapee
events.description: A goblin deserter offers secrets for safety.

events.name: Flooded Passage
events.description: Knee-deep water hides trip hazards.

events.name: King's Tax
events.description: Tribute chests head toward the throne room.

events.name: Iron Cell Block
events.description: Rows of cells stretch into dripping dark.

events.name: Warden's Log
events.description: A ledger lists prisoners never ransomed.

events.name: Secret Tunnel
events.description: Mortar crumbles behind a loose stone.

events.name: Chain Gang
events.description: Ghostly echoes of chained feet shuffle past.

events.name: Torture Rack
events.description: Rust and old stains tell grim stories.

events.name: Prison Riot
events.description: Inmates bang doors — chaos spreads.

events.name: Noble Prisoner
events.description: A masked noble offers wealth for silence.

events.name: Jailer's Bribe
events.description: The jailer sells keys to the highest bidder.

events.name: Flooded Dungeon
events.description: Water rises in the lower levels.

events.name: Forgotten Saint
events.description: A prisoner carved prayers into the wall.

events.name: Audience with the King
events.description: The Goblin King lounges on a throne of stolen gold.

outcomes.description: Legends will speak of this day.
The king laughs and pays you to leave.
A tense standoff ends in stalemate.

events.name: Tribute Demand
events.description: The king demands your gear as 'tax.'

outcomes.description: Legends will speak of this day.
The king laughs and pays you to leave.
A tense standoff ends in stalemate.

events.name: Champion's Challenge
events.description: The king's champion steps forward grinning.

outcomes.description: Legends will speak of this day.
The king laughs and pays you to leave.
A tense standoff ends in stalemate.

events.name: Royal Heist
events.description: The crown sits unguarded — for three heartbeats.

outcomes.description: Legends will speak of this day.
The king laughs and pays you to leave.
A tense standoff ends in stalemate.

events.name: Peace Parley
events.description: The king offers a truce — if you kneel.

outcomes.description: Legends will speak of this day.
The king laughs and pays you to leave.
A tense standoff ends in stalemate.

events.name: The Mysterious Stranger
events.description: A cloaked figure offers a deal that seems too good to be true.

outcomes.description: The deal pays off! Gold and information change hands.
A trap! Your coin purse vanishes.

events.name: Tavern Brawl
events.description: A drunken patron challenges you to a fight!

events.name: The Fortune Teller
events.description: An old woman with milky eyes beckons you. 'I see your bloodline's fate.'

events.name: The Underground Game
events.description: A shadowy figure offers entry to a high-stakes gambling den.

events.name: The Wandering Merchant
events.description: A traveling merchant spreads exotic wares across a table.

events.name: The Death Duel
events.description: A notorious duelist blocks your path. 'Your bloodline ends tonight!'
